title: The Everwild
description: The Everwild is a public modded SMP featuring Create and Spectrum, along with updated world generation and other additions. This is the official modpack for our server.
body:
# The Everwild
Welcome to The Everwild, a modded SMP with a RP-lite focus on world building, exploration, and comradarie. This modpack is our official server-ready modpack, it is required for signing on to the server.

## Invite Only Server
Right now our server is available by invite only, but you're welcome to grab the modpack and check out our set up! If you're interested in joining us, check back later for public invite periods.
